title: Microsoft Copilot Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Microsoft Copilot in everyday tasks.

commands.command: Summarise this document
commands.description: Provides a concise summary of the document's content.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a long document.

commands.command: Rewrite this in simpler language
commands.description: Simplifies complex text for easier understanding.
commands.scenario: When a text is too complex for the audience.

commands.command: Generate a creative story about a dragon
commands.description: Creates an imaginative story based on the given prompt.
commands.scenario: When you need inspiration for creative writing.

commands.command: Translate this paragraph to Spanish
commands.description: Translates text from one language to another.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate with someone in a different language.

commands.command: Create a to-do list for a project
commands.description: Generates a structured to-do list based on project details.
commands.scenario: When organizing tasks for a new project.

commands.command: Explain this concept like I'm five
commands.description: Breaks down complex ideas into simple terms.
commands.scenario: When explaining a difficult concept to a beginner.

commands.command: Draft an email to thank a client
commands.description: Creates a professional thank-you email draft.
commands.scenario: When you need to send a thank-you email to a client.

commands.command: Brainstorm ideas for a marketing campaign
commands.description: Generates creative ideas for marketing strategies.
commands.scenario: When planning a new marketing campaign.

commands.command: Convert this list into a table
commands.description: Transforms a list into a formatted table.
commands.scenario: When you need to organize data more clearly.

commands.command: Summarize this meeting transcript
commands.description: Provides key points from a meeting transcript.
commands.scenario: When you need to quickly understand meeting outcomes.

commands.command: Generate a list of pros and cons
commands.description: Creates a balanced list of advantages and disadvantages.
commands.scenario: When evaluating a decision or choice.

commands.command: Create a presentation outline
commands.description: Generates an outline for a presentation.
commands.scenario: When preparing for a presentation and need a structured outline.

commands.command: Find recent research on climate change
commands.description: Fetches the latest research articles on a given topic.
commands.scenario: When you need up-to-date information for a report.

commands.command: Format this text as a formal letter
commands.description: Reformats text into a formal letter structure.
commands.scenario: When you need to send a formal letter.

commands.command: List key takeaways from this article
commands.description: Identifies and lists the main points from an article.
commands.scenario: When you need to extract important information from a text.

commands.command: Analyze this data and identify the three most significant trends
commands.description: Use this when you paste raw data or upload a spreadsheet to get high-level insights without manual calculation.

commands.command: Act as a professional editor and critique my writing for tone and clarity
commands.description: Instead of just rewriting, this asks Copilot to provide feedback on how your message comes across to others.

commands.command: Create a step-by-step tutorial based on this process
commands.description: Turn a messy description of a task into a structured, easy-to-follow guide for others to use.

commands.command: Generate 5 different subject line options for this email
commands.description: Helps increase open rates by providing a variety of catchy, professional, or urgent options for your correspondence.

commands.command: Compare these two different products/ideas in a side-by-side comparison
commands.description: Perfect for decision-making when you need to weigh two specific options against each other based on provided text.
